task: Implement the pure-Python Metropolis-Hastings sampler in mcmc_baseline.py after reading CLAUDE.md constraints, then run benchmark.py and report whether acceptance rate and variance pass target thresholds.
goal_notes: The sampler was implemented with log-space acceptance logic, benchmarked, and met the acceptance-rate and variance thresholds.
system_prompt: You are an AI assistant accessed via an API.
learning: For numerical-stability-constrained MCMC tasks, implementing acceptance checks entirely in log-space and validating immediately with the provided benchmark is the fastest way to confirm both correctness and exploration behavior.
